description: World Memory System configuration — all tunable thresholds, windows, and evaluator parameters.

position_sampler.description: Real-time seconds between position breadcrumb recordings.

retention.description: Controls event pruning. prune_age_threshold = game-time before events are pruneable. timeline_window = game-time per mandatory marker. prune_interval = game-time between prune cycles.

event_recorder.description: Prime sieve generates primes up to this limit for interpretation triggers. chunk_size must match core/config.py CHUNK_SIZE.

interpreter.description: Controls how interpretations propagate up the geographic hierarchy.

npc_local.description: Default window for NPC context queries.

query_thresholds.description: Minimum relevance scores and display limits for query results.

narrative_templates.major: The {enemy} population has been devastated in {region}. {count} have been killed in a short period. The species may take significant time to recover in this area.
narrative_templates.significant: {enemy} numbers are noticeably declining in {region}. {count} have been killed recently.
narrative_templates.moderate: Increased hunting activity has thinned the {enemy} population in {region}.

population_change.description: Detects when enemy kills in a region exceed natural recovery thresholds.

narrative_templates.major: {resource} deposits are critically strained in {region}. Over {count} units have been harvested recently, far outpacing natural regeneration.
narrative_templates.significant: {resource} is becoming scarce in {region}. Heavy harvesting ({count} units) is depleting available nodes.
narrative_templates.moderate: Notable {resource} harvesting activity in {region}. Resource availability may be declining.

resource_pressure.description: Detects when gathering outpaces regeneration in an area.

narrative_templates.major: {region} is extremely dangerous. The adventurer has died {deaths} times here recently. This area poses a serious threat.
narrative_templates.significant_death: {region} has proven hazardous. Frequent combat injuries and a death mark this area as dangerous.
narrative_templates.significant_deaths: {region} has proven hazardous. Frequent combat injuries and deaths mark this area as dangerous.
narrative_templates.moderate: Combat activity is elevated in {region}. The adventurer has taken repeated damage here.

area_danger.description: Detects when an area becomes more or less dangerous based on combat damage and deaths.

1.template: The adventurer has slain their first {enemy} in {region}.

5.template: The adventurer is becoming experienced at hunting {enemy}s in {region}.

11.template: The adventurer has become a proficient {enemy} hunter, with {count} kills in {region}.

29.template: The adventurer is a seasoned {enemy} slayer. {count} have fallen in {region}.

97.template: The adventurer is legendary among {enemy} hunters. {count} kills in {region}.

player_milestones.description: Detects notable player achievements: kill counts, levels, crafting quality.

crafting_trends.description: Detects crafting specialization and quality trends.
